title: IHF GAD67+ NeuN Staining Protocol
author: Aroa S Maroto
materials: Bring the VECTASHIELD‱ HardSet‱ to room temperature

steps.title: Select the slices to be performed...
steps.instruction: Select the slices to be performed and place one slice and citrate into 2 ml tubes. Place one slice in each tube and ensure they are completely submerged.

steps.title: Remove GAD67 antibody
steps.instruction: Remove GAD67 antibody

steps.title: Add 500 μl/well of blocking Buffer...
steps.instruction: Add 500 μl/well of blocking Buffer 2 hours at RT with gentle shaking

steps.title: Remove primary antibody
steps.instruction: Remove primary antibody

steps.title: Remove Secondary antibody
steps.instruction: Remove Secondary antibody

steps.title: Place around 3 slices/well on multi-well...
steps.instruction: Place around 3 slices/well on multi-well plate and wash with 500 ul wash buffer (Wb) 3 times x 5 min each. Kindly ensure that all the tissue in the well is thoroughly covered.

steps.title: Place the tubes in the thermoblock...
steps.instruction: Place the tubes in the thermoblock at 80ºC for 20 minutes. Shaking gently is not compulsory.

steps.title: Remove the blocking buffer
steps.instruction: Remove the blocking buffer

steps.title: Add 500 μl/well of the primary...
steps.instruction: Add 500 μl/well of the primary antibody to each well and incubate at 4 °C with gentle shaking overweekend

steps.title: Prepare primary antibody dilution GAD67 1/500 in antibody diluent
steps.instruction: Prepare primary antibody dilution GAD67 1/500 in antibody diluent

steps.title: Add 500 μl/well of the secondary...
steps.instruction: Add 500 μl/well of the secondary antibody to each well and incubate at RT with gentle shaking for 2 hours.

steps.title: Add 500 μl/well Wb and shaking...
steps.instruction: Add 500 μl/well Wb and shaking incubation for 5 min and remove buffer (Repeat this step minimum 3 times)

steps.title: Prepare secondary antibody dilution Anti- Mouse 488 1/500
steps.instruction: Prepare secondary antibody dilution Anti- Mouse 488 1/500

steps.title: Remove the Wb
steps.instruction: Remove the Wb

steps.title: Prepare primary antibody dilution NeuN 1/1000 in antibody diluent
steps.instruction: Prepare primary antibody dilution NeuN 1/1000 in antibody diluent

steps.title: Add 500 μl/well of the primary...
steps.instruction: Add 500 μl/well of the primary antibody to each well and incubate at 4 °C with gentle shaking overweekend

steps.title: Remove secondary antibody
steps.instruction: Remove secondary antibody

steps.title: Add 500 µl/well Wb and shaking...
steps.instruction: Add 500 µl/well Wb and shaking incubation for 5 min and remove buffer (Repeat this step minimum 3 times).

steps.title: Put the cover slide in a...
steps.instruction: Put the cover slide in a dark box and leave it to dry

steps.title: Add 500 µl/well Wb and shaking...
steps.instruction: Add 500 µl/well Wb and shaking incubation for 5 min and remove buffer (Repeat this step minimum 3 times).

steps.title: Add 500 μl/well of the secondary...
steps.instruction: Add 500 μl/well of the secondary antibody to each well and incubate at RT with gentle shaking

steps.title: Prepare secondary antibody dilution Anti- Mouse 647 1/500
steps.instruction: Prepare secondary antibody dilution Anti- Mouse 647 1/500

steps.title: Add 500 µl/well Wb and shaking...
steps.instruction: Add 500 µl/well Wb and shaking incubation for 5 min and remove buffer (Repeat this step minimum 3 times)

steps.title: Remove DAPI
steps.instruction: Remove DAPI

steps.title: Add 500 µl/well of the DAPI...
steps.instruction: Add 500 µl/well of the DAPI to each well and incubate at RT with gentle shaking for 5 minutes

steps.title: Add 500 µl/well Wb and shaking...
steps.instruction: Add 500 µl/well Wb and shaking incubation for 5 min and remove buffer (Repeat this step minimum 3 times)

steps.title: 20 You have your slices ready for the microscope
steps.instruction: 20 You have your slices ready for the microscope

steps.title: Mount the slices on the slides
steps.instruction: Mount the slices on the slides. Cover with approximately 50 µl of VECTASHIELD‱ HardSet‱ per slice
